colour() color()

Informations

Okabe and Ito's colour scheme

scale_colour_okabeito() scale_color_okabeito() scale_fill_okabeito()

compare()

convert()

Simulate Colour-Blindness

plot(<colour_scheme>) plot_scheme() plot_map() plot_scheme_colourblind() plot_scheme_colorblind()
